title: Cell Decision Simulator
description: Simulate how cells respond to stress signals and noise; explore PCA landscape and decision probabilities.

title: Information Loss Analyzer
description: Measure how much stimulus information survives noisy transduction into pathway readouts.

title: Drug Response Predictor
description: Explore dose–response, resistance risk, and survival vs apoptosis under treatment constraints.

title: Explainable Cell AI
description: Feature importance and Gemma-style Q&A over dataset-driven drivers and simulation context.

title: Edge Biology Assistant
description: Lightweight PCA landscape and local-first explanations for low-resource or classroom demos.
